same_window_used_for_both_averages: Computed both the 6-hour and 12-hour averages from a single shared time window instead of separate intervals.
active_status_filter_omitted: Counted or inspected medication orders without constraining the search to active orders.
wrong_procedure_code_used: Queried a procedure code that does not match the requested study and based the answer on that mismatched code.
inconsistent_time_window_bounds: Used mismatched timestamp anchors across queries, so the requested measurement windows were not applied consistently.
final_response_not_submitted: Performed retrieval and/or write actions but never produced the required final FINISH answer.
patient_identifier_used_as_resource_refe: Looked up the patient but then used the external identifier in query/reference fields where the resolved FHIR resource id was needed.
wrong_procedure_code_assumed_for_cathete: Checked catheter presence using an assumed procedure code that does not reliably represent the target catheter event.
medicationrequest_pagination_omitted: Stopped after the first MedicationRequest page and concluded none existed without traversing additional results.
heart_rate_code_filter_omitted: Searched generic vital-sign observations without restricting to heart-rate observations before answering.
medicationrequest_results_not_parsed: Ran the MedicationRequest search but concluded no relevant active orders without actually inspecting the returned bundle contents.
non_prophylaxis_anticoagulants_counted: Treated unrelated anticoagulant or treatment-dose medications as DVT prophylaxis orders when deciding whether exactly one existed.
required_duplicate_discontinuation_not_a: Identified multiple active target orders but stopped without performing the instructed duplicate-discontinue action.
observation_results_not_parsed: Queried the right Observation resources/time windows but answered as if none existed instead of extracting and averaging returned values.
procedure_date_misread_from_result: Used a procedure date different from the retrieved result when composing the order or final conclusion.
catheter_removal_check_omitted: Ordered catheter removal after finding an old placement without actually checking for a documented removal order.
prophylaxis_order_created_without_confir: Created a DVT prophylaxis order despite not having confirmed from query results that zero active orders existed.
imaging_order_code_mismatch: Placed a new imaging order with a code/study variant that does not exactly match the requested prior procedure type.
influenza_vaccine_code_too_narrow: Looked for prior influenza vaccination using only one CPT code, risking omission of more recent flu vaccines documented under other codes.
repeat_thyroid_order_missing_ft4: Applied the repeat-thyroid-testing protocol but ordered only TSH instead of the full repeat thyroid panel including free T4.
date_filter_misapplied_to_active_orders: Applied an authored-on date restriction when verifying active medications, excluding older still-active orders and leading to an unnecessary new order.
no_prior_study_treated_as_no_action: Interpreted absence of a prior qualifying study as a reason not to place the requested new order.
first_page_results_discarded_after_pagin: After paging through results, the agent answered from later-page findings and failed to retain relevant matches already seen on the first page.
service_request_multi_code_misused: Created one ServiceRequest with multiple unrelated test codes stuffed into a single code element instead of representing the repeat tests correctly.
duplicate_order_created_after_success: After already receiving a successful create response, the agent repeated the same order creation and produced duplicates.
inpatient_category_filter_misapplied: Restricted the active-medication check with an added category=Inpatient filter, risking exclusion of relevant active orders before deciding to create a new one.
naloxone_order_created_without_confirmin: Created a naloxone prescription without first confirming from the retrieved medication orders that an active opioid lacked matching naloxone coverage.
distinct_windows_collapsed_to_same_avera: Returned the same heart-rate average for both 6-hour and 12-hour windows despite querying separate intervals, implying one result was reused for both.
older_catheter_placements_excluded_by_da: Applied a date filter that only looked for recent catheter procedures, excluding older placements that could still be in place past the 48-hour threshold.
